🪵
Craft

Achill Wood Crafts

Hand-turned wooden crafts, made on Achill Island

📍 Cashel Market 📍 Keel Market

About Achill Wood Crafts

Achill Wood Crafts is one of the standout stalls at Achill Island Market. Every piece is hand-turned right here on Achill Island using traditional woodworking techniques — no two items are ever the same.

The stall features a stunning range of decorative bowls, unique skeleton-face mantel clocks that have become a signature piece, hand-turned cups and vessels, and beautiful painted items that make perfect gifts or keepsakes from the Wild Atlantic Way.

Whether you're looking for a handmade souvenir from Achill Island or a one-of-a-kind decorative piece for your home, Achill Wood Crafts has something special. The craftsmanship and attention to detail in every piece reflects the character and spirit of Achill Island itself.

What You'll Find

🪵 Decorative Bowls

Hand-turned from local and reclaimed wood, each bowl is unique in grain and shape.

🕐 Mantel Clocks

Stunning skeleton-face clocks — the signature piece. Functional art for any home.

☕ Wooden Cups

Hand-turned cups and vessels, smooth-finished and ready for everyday use or display.

🎨 Painted Pieces

Colourful painted wooden items — perfect gifts and keepsakes from Achill.

Achill Island Market

Two locations on Achill Island: Cashel (Wednesdays at Ted's Bar) & Keel (Saturdays). Local food, crafts and artisan goods.
